Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

- Week 1: Security Concepts: CIA triad, Zero Trust, shared responsibility
- Week 2: Microsoft Entra: Identity types, authentication, access management
- Week 3: Security Solutions: Defender, Sentinel, security management
- Week 4: Compliance: Purview, information protection, DLP, practice exams
